sql_array: CREATE TABLE business_entities (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), description TEXT);
INSERT INTO business_entities (id, name, description) VALUES (1, 'Test Business 1', 'Description of Test Business 1');
INSERT INTO business_entities (id, name, description) VALUES (2, 'Test Business 2', 'Description of Test Business 2');
UPDATE business_entities SET description = 'Updated description' WHERE id = 1;
